negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: av_8424d9ae-633f-4d72-90a4-18e9457ebd90
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a car, positioned directly behind a UPS delivery truck on a quiet residential street. The street is lined with parked cars on both sides, including a white SUV on the right and a gray sedan on the left. The surrounding area features multi-story apartment buildings with light-colored facades, partially obscured by lush green trees that cast dappled shadows across the road. The sky above is partly cloudy, allowing patches of blue to peek through, suggesting a bright, sunny day. As the video progresses, a black sedan passes by in the opposite direction of the ego vehicle on the opposing lane. The rear lights of the UPS truck are flashing, indicating that it is stationary. The gray sedan also remains parked on the left side of the street. The white SUV remains stationary on the right side throughout the sequence. The ego vehicle temporarily enters the opposite lane to overtake a UPS delivery truck that is stopped ahead, passing by the parked cars and the apartment buildings, while the trees continue to provide shade and a serene backdrop. By the final frame, the ego vehicle has moved further down the street, with the gray sedan now completely out of view, and the UPS delivery truck still parked on the right side of the street.  A medium shot from a slightly elevated perspective captures the scene, emphasizing the parked vehicles, the apartment buildings, and the lush greenery. The camera remains steady, focusing on the interaction between the ego vehicle and the stationary UPS truck, highlighting the calm and orderly nature of the residential neighborhood.
